auth_env_var_specs.name: YOUTUBE_API_KEY
auth_env_var_specs.description: YouTube Data API key for read-only public-data operations

novel_features.name: Bulk search from stdin
novel_features.description: Take a list of search terms from stdin or args, return top-N YouTube videos per term in one JSON document with titles, channels, embed URLs, and thumbnails.

novel_features.name: Transcript fetcher
novel_features.description: Fetch the spoken-content transcript of a YouTube video using the timedtext endpoint. Works for auto-generated and manual captions on any public video. Caches into the local store.

novel_features.name: Embed snippet generator
novel_features.description: Print embed HTML, iframe, or markdown-style embed for a video ID. Direct copy-paste into a blog draft.

novel_features.name: Topic-similarity related videos
novel_features.description: Find videos related to a target video using topicDetails + same-channel + tag overlap from the local store. Best-effort replacement for the deprecated relatedToVideoId parameter.

novel_features.name: Top comments by likes
novel_features.description: Fetch top comments on a video, ranked locally by likeCount. Pulls up to 5 pages from commentThreads.list and sorts so most-liked floats regardless of API order.

novel_features.name: Channel uploads in one call
novel_features.description: List a channel's most recent uploads in one call. Resolves @handle or channelId, walks the auto-generated uploads playlist, returns video IDs + titles + publish times.
